title: physostegia virginiana subsp. virginiana
intro: Physostegia virginiana subsp. virginiana, also known as the tall, or obedient plant, is a perennial plant species native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing inflammation, and relieving respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Physostegia virginiana subsp. virginiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
